/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ppe_gui.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/ppe_gui.dir/src/gui/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ppe_gui.dir/src/modules/psu_basic/widget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ppe_gui.dir/src/modules/psu_basic/model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ppe_gui.dir/src/modules/psu_symmetric/widget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ppe_gui.dir/src/modules/psu_symmetric/model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ppe_gui.dir/src/modules/antenna_basic/widget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ppe_gui.dir/src/modules/antenna_basic/model.cpp.o -o ppe_gui  libppe_core.a /usr/lib64/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib64/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2
